name: stockyard-contextpack
description: Rule-based context injection from local files. Keyword-matched chunks injected into prompts automatically. No embeddings, no vector DB.

tools.name: contextpack_sources
tools.description: List configured context sources and their chunk counts.

tools.name: contextpack_search
tools.description: Search context sources for relevant chunks. Preview what would be injected.

tools.name: contextpack_stats
tools.description: Get context injection statistics: total injections, avg chunks, token overhead.

tools.name: contextpack_reindex
tools.description: Re-index all context sources after adding new files.

tools.name: contextpack_proxy_status
tools.description: Check if the ContextPack proxy is running and healthy.
